---
title: "Contact"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
date: today
language:
  title-block-published: "Last modified"
---

<style>
#title-block-header,
#quarto-header,
#quarto-header-headroom {
  display: none !important;
}
</style>

```{=html}
<header class="subpage-fixed-header">
  <div class="subpage-fixed-header-inner">
    <a href="index.html" class="subpage-site-mark">Canada Forest ALS</a>
    <nav class="subpage-topnav">
      <a href="index.html#interactive-map">Map</a>
      <a href="index.html#summary">Summary</a>
      <a href="data.html">Data sources</a>
      <a href="log.html">Updates</a>
      <a href="https://github.com/ptompalski/CanadaForestLidarCoverage">GitHub</a>
    </nav>
  </div>
</header>
<section class="column-screen subpage-hero-band">
  <div class="subpage-hero-copy">
    <p class="subpage-eyebrow">Resources</p>
    <h1>Contact</h1>
    <p class="subpage-hero-lede">Use this page to report missing coverage, flag errors, or point us to jurisdictional updates that should be reflected in the maps.</p>
  </div>
</section>
<div class="subpage-main">
```

::: {.subpage-copy-wide}
If you find errors or know of ALS coverage that should be added to the maps, please open an issue in the repository or contact the project team directly.
:::

::: {.subpage-summary-grid}
::: {.subpage-summary-card}
### GitHub issues

Report a problem or suggest a correction through the [project issue tracker](https://github.com/ptompalski/CanadaForestLidarCoverage/issues/new).
:::

::: {.subpage-summary-card}
### Direct contacts

Piotr Tompalski: piotr.tompalski\@nrcan-rncan.gc.ca

Joanne White: joanne.white\@nrcan-rncan.gc.ca
:::
:::

```{=html}
</div>
<section class="column-screen subpage-footer-wrap">
  <footer class="subpage-footer">
    <div class="subpage-footer-inner">
      <div>
        <p class="subpage-footer-title">ALS data coverage in Canadian forests</p>
        <p class="subpage-footer-copy">Project contacts and issue reporting for map corrections and new coverage leads.</p>
      </div>
      <nav class="subpage-footer-links">
        <a href="index.html">Home</a>
        <a href="data.html">Data access</a>
        <a href="log.html">Update log</a>
        <a href="https://github.com/ptompalski/CanadaForestLidarCoverage">GitHub repository</a>
      </nav>
    </div>
  </footer>
</section>
```
